decisions.title: Internal CVSS calculator over external library
decisions.rationale: MVP §5 suggests the 'cvss' library, but an internal implementation avoids a heavy dependency and ensures deterministic scoring. Per @vulnerability-scanner CVSS+Context approach.

decisions.title: YAML rules over database-stored rules
decisions.rationale: PRD §5 specifies 'Security rules stored as configuration files'. YAML is human-readable, git-trackable, and easy to extend. Per @vulnerability-scanner scanning methodology.

decisions.title: Decorator-based scanner registry
decisions.rationale: MVP §11 architecture requires modular scanners. @register_scanner decorator enables plug-and-play without manual configuration. Inspired by @security-auditor defense-in-depth principle.

decisions.title: Pre-scan identity verification with interactive confirmation
decisions.rationale: Prompt spec §C.1 mandates STS identity display and user confirmation. Per @security-auditor zero-trust principle and PRD §9 security requirements.

decisions.title: Permission pre-checks using minimal safe API calls
decisions.rationale: Prompt spec §C.2 requires detecting AccessDenied before scanning. Maps each service to a single lightweight read-only API call. Per @security-auditor fail-secure principle.

decisions.title: Explicit exclusion of s3:GetObject, kms:Decrypt, secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
decisions.rationale: Prompt spec §D mandates excluding these by default. CloudGuard checks metadata only, not data contents. Per @security-auditor least privilege principle.

decisions.title: PBKDF2 + AES-GCM for credential caching
decisions.rationale: Prompt spec §E requires strong KDF with safe iterations and AES-GCM. 600k PBKDF2 iterations matches OWASP recommendation. Entirely opt-in per PRD §6 no-credential-storage requirement.

decisions.title: ThreadPoolExecutor over asyncio for concurrency
decisions.rationale: boto3 is not async-native. ThreadPoolExecutor with configurable concurrency (default 4) provides safe concurrent scanning without async complexity. Per prompt spec §8.
